steps.name: Home view renders staples grouped by area
steps.criteria: ServiceProvider + AppShell + HomeView + AreaSection + TripItemRow render trip items grouped by house area. Fridge shows Whole milk and Butter. Bathroom shows Toilet paper and Shampoo.
steps.scenario_name: displays staples under their house area headings

steps.name: Quick-add places item on trip
steps.criteria: QuickAdd component accepts text input, submitting adds item to trip and it appears in the home view
steps.scenario_name: adds a quick-add item that appears on the home screen

steps.name: Toggle switches home to store view
steps.criteria: Tapping Store toggle hides home area headings and shows store aisle headings
steps.scenario_name: hides home view and shows store view on toggle tap

steps.name: Store view renders items by aisle
steps.criteria: Store view shows items under Aisle 3: Dairy, Aisle 5: Canned Goods, etc. Numbered aisles before named sections.
steps.scenario_name: displays items under aisle and section headings

steps.name: Check off item in store view
steps.criteria: Tapping item in store view toggles checked state with visual indicator
steps.scenario_name: shows item as checked after tap

steps.name: Trip completion with summary
steps.criteria: Finish Trip button shows summary with purchased count and carryover items
steps.scenario_name: displays trip summary with purchased and carryover counts

steps.name: AsyncStorage staple adapter with cache
steps.criteria: createAsyncStapleStorage implements StapleStorage port. Loads from AsyncStorage into cache on init. Sync reads from cache. Writes update cache then persist async.

steps.name: AsyncStorage trip adapter with cache
steps.criteria: createAsyncTripStorage implements TripStorage port. Same cached pattern as staple adapter.

steps.name: App initialization and wiring
steps.criteria: useAppInitialization hook creates adapters, initializes caches, creates services. App.tsx wires ServiceProvider with real adapters. Loading screen shown during init.
